@@ -0,0 +1,405 @@
+import type {
+  CapsulePull,
+  CapsuleRarity,
+  Inventory,
+} from '../../shared/arena';
+import {
+  CAPSULE_COST,
+  CAPSULE_PITY,
+  DUPLICATE_REFUND,
+} from '../../shared/arena';
+import { createSeededNumberGenerator, hashTextToSeed } from './random';
+import type { ArenaStorage } from './scribbit';
+import {
+  INK_CATALOG,
+  INK_PEN_CATALOG,
+  INK_TITLE_CATALOG,
+  type InkCatalogEntry,
+} from './ink';
+
+type InkTransaction = {
+  multi: () => Promise<void>;
+  exec: () => Promise<unknown[]>;
+  discard: () => Promise<void>;
+  unwatch: () => Promise<unknown>;
+  incrBy: (key: string, value: number) => Promise<unknown>;
+  set: (key: string, value: string) => Promise<unknown>;
+  hSet: (key: string, fieldValues: Record<string, string>) => Promise<unknown>;
+};
+
+export type InkStorage = ArenaStorage & {
+  watch?: (...keys: string[]) => Promise<InkTransaction>;
+};
+
+export type CapsulePullSuccess = {
+  status: 'pulled';
+  pull: CapsulePull;
+  ink: number;
+  inventory: Inventory;
+};
+
+export type CapsulePullInsufficientInk = {
+  status: 'insufficientInk';
+  ink: number;
+};
+
+export type CapsulePullResult =
+  | CapsulePullSuccess
+  | CapsulePullInsufficientInk;
+
+type CapsuleSelectionOptions = {
+  userId: string;
+  day: number;
+  pullCount: number;
+  pullsSinceEpic: number;
+};
+
+type InkRewardClaimOptions = {
+  payoutKey: string;
+  payoutField: string;
+  userId: string;
+  amount: number;
+  paidAtMs: number;
+};
+
+const maximumTransactionAttempts = 5;
+
+export const getInkKey = (userId: string): string => {
+  return `ink:${userId}`;
+};
+
+export const getInventoryKey = (userId: string): string => {
+  return `inventory:${userId}`;
+};
+
+export const getPullsSinceEpicKey = (userId: string): string => {
+  return `pullsSinceEpic:${userId}`;
+};
+
+export const getCapsulePullCountKey = (userId: string): string => {
+  return `capsulePulls:${userId}`;
+};
+
+export const getRumbleWinInkPayoutKey = (day: number): string => {
+  return `ink:payout:rumbleWin:${day}`;
+};
+
+const parseStoredNonNegativeInteger = (
+  storedValue: string | undefined
+): number => {
+  if (storedValue === undefined) {
+    return 0;
+  }
+
+  const parsedValue = Number(storedValue);
+  if (!Number.isInteger(parsedValue) || parsedValue < 0) {
+    return 0;
+  }
+
+  return parsedValue;
+};
+
+export const getInkBalance = async (
+  storage: ArenaStorage,
+  userId: string
+): Promise<number> => {
+  return parseStoredNonNegativeInteger(await storage.get(getInkKey(userId)));
+};
+
+export const awardInk = async (
+  storage: ArenaStorage,
+  userId: string,
+  amount: number
+): Promise<number> => {
+  if (!Number.isInteger(amount) || amount <= 0) {
+    return await getInkBalance(storage, userId);
+  }
+
+  return await storage.incrBy(getInkKey(userId), amount);
+};
+
+export const claimInkReward = async (
+  storage: ArenaStorage,
+  options: InkRewardClaimOptions
+): Promise<boolean> => {
+  if (options.amount <= 0) {
+    return false;
+  }
+
+  const createdClaim = await storage.hSetNX(
+    options.payoutKey,
+    options.payoutField,
+    `${options.userId}:${options.amount}:${options.paidAtMs}`
+  );
+
+  if (createdClaim !== 1) {
+    return false;
+  }
+
+  await awardInk(storage, options.userId, options.amount);
+  return true;
+};
+
+export const loadInventory = async (
+  storage: ArenaStorage,
+  userId: string
+): Promise<Inventory> => {
+  const storedInventory = await storage.hGetAll(getInventoryKey(userId));
+
+  return {
+    pens: INK_PEN_CATALOG.filter((entry) => {
+      return storedInventory[entry.id] !== undefined;
+    }).map((entry) => {
+      return entry.id;
+    }),
+    titles: INK_TITLE_CATALOG.filter((entry) => {
+      return storedInventory[entry.id] !== undefined;
+    }).map((entry) => {
+      return entry.id;
+    }),
+  };
+};
+
+export const chooseCapsuleRarity = (roll: number): CapsuleRarity => {
+  if (roll < 0.7) {
+    return 'common';
+  }
+
+  if (roll < 0.95) {
+    return 'rare';
+  }
+
+  return 'epic';
+};
+
+export const isCapsulePityPull = (pullsSinceEpic: number): boolean => {
+  return pullsSinceEpic + 1 >= CAPSULE_PITY;
+};
+
+const chooseEntryForRarity = (
+  rarity: CapsuleRarity,
+  roll: number
+): InkCatalogEntry => {
+  const matchingEntries = INK_CATALOG.filter((entry) => {
+    return entry.rarity === rarity;
+  });
+  const selectedEntry = matchingEntries[Math.floor(roll * matchingEntries.length)];
+
+  if (!selectedEntry) {
+    throw new Error(`No Mystery Ink catalog entries for ${rarity}.`);
+  }
+
+  return selectedEntry;
+};
+
+export const selectCapsuleDrop = (
+  options: CapsuleSelectionOptions
+): InkCatalogEntry => {
+  const seed = hashTextToSeed(
+    `capsule:${options.userId}:${options.day}:${options.pullCount}`
+  );
+  const randomNumber = createSeededNumberGenerator(seed);
+  const rarity = isCapsulePityPull(options.pullsSinceEpic)
+    ? 'epic'
+    : chooseCapsuleRarity(randomNumber());
+
+  return chooseEntryForRarity(rarity, randomNumber());
+};
+
+const createCapsulePull = (
+  entry: InkCatalogEntry,
+  isNew: boolean
+): CapsulePull => {
+  return {
+    rarity: entry.rarity,
+    kind: entry.kind,
+    id: entry.id,
+    name: entry.name,
+    description: entry.description,
+    isNew,
+  };
+};
+
+const unlockInventoryEntry = async (
+  storage: ArenaStorage,
+  userId: string,
+  entry: InkCatalogEntry
+): Promise<void> => {
+  await storage.hSet(getInventoryKey(userId), {
+    [entry.id]: entry.kind,
+  });
+};
+
+const applyCapsulePullWithoutTransaction = async (
+  storage: InkStorage,
+  userId: string,
+  entry: InkCatalogEntry,
+  isNew: boolean,
+  nextPullCount: number,
+  nextPullsSinceEpic: number
+): Promise<void> => {
+  await storage.incrBy(getInkKey(userId), -CAPSULE_COST);
+
+  if (!isNew) {
+    await storage.incrBy(getInkKey(userId), DUPLICATE_REFUND);
+  }
+
+  await storage.set(getCapsulePullCountKey(userId), nextPullCount.toString());
+  await storage.set(
+    getPullsSinceEpicKey(userId),
+    nextPullsSinceEpic.toString()
+  );
+
+  if (isNew) {
+    await unlockInventoryEntry(storage, userId, entry);
+  }
+};
+
+const applyCapsulePullWithTransaction = async (
+  transaction: InkTransaction,
+  userId: string,
+  entry: InkCatalogEntry,
+  isNew: boolean,
+  nextPullCount: number,
+  nextPullsSinceEpic: number
+): Promise<boolean> => {
+  await transaction.multi();
+  await transaction.incrBy(getInkKey(userId), -CAPSULE_COST);
+
+  if (!isNew) {
+    await transaction.incrBy(getInkKey(userId), DUPLICATE_REFUND);
+  }
+
+  await transaction.set(getCapsulePullCountKey(userId), nextPullCount.toString());
+  await transaction.set(
+    getPullsSinceEpicKey(userId),
+    nextPullsSinceEpic.toString()
+  );
+
+  if (isNew) {
+    await transaction.hSet(getInventoryKey(userId), {
+      [entry.id]: entry.kind,
+    });
+  }
+
+  const execResult: unknown = await transaction.exec();
+  return Array.isArray(execResult) && execResult.length > 0;
+};
+
+const discardTransaction = async (
+  transaction: InkTransaction | undefined
+): Promise<void> => {
+  if (!transaction) {
+    return;
+  }
+
+  try {
+    await transaction.discard();
+  } catch (error) {
+    console.warn('Mystery Ink transaction cleanup failed:', error);
+  }
+};
+
+const readPullCount = async (
+  storage: ArenaStorage,
+  userId: string
+): Promise<number> => {
+  return parseStoredNonNegativeInteger(
+    await storage.get(getCapsulePullCountKey(userId))
+  );
+};
+
+const readPullsSinceEpic = async (
+  storage: ArenaStorage,
+  userId: string
+): Promise<number> => {
+  return parseStoredNonNegativeInteger(
+    await storage.get(getPullsSinceEpicKey(userId))
+  );
+};
+
+export const pullCapsuleForUser = async (
+  storage: InkStorage,
+  userId: string,
+  day: number
+): Promise<CapsulePullResult> => {
+  const watchedKeys = [
+    getInkKey(userId),
+    getInventoryKey(userId),
+    getCapsulePullCountKey(userId),
+    getPullsSinceEpicKey(userId),
+  ];
+
+  for (let attempt = 0; attempt < maximumTransactionAttempts; attempt += 1) {
+    let transaction: InkTransaction | undefined;
+
+    try {
+      if (storage.watch) {
+        transaction = await storage.watch(...watchedKeys);
+      }
+
+      const inkBalance = await getInkBalance(storage, userId);
+
+      if (inkBalance < CAPSULE_COST) {
+        if (transaction) {
+          await transaction.unwatch();
+        }
+
+        return {
+          status: 'insufficientInk',
+          ink: inkBalance,
+        };
+      }
+
+      const pullCount = await readPullCount(storage, userId);
+      const pullsSinceEpic = await readPullsSinceEpic(storage, userId);
+      const inventoryEntries = await storage.hGetAll(getInventoryKey(userId));
+      const nextPullCount = pullCount + 1;
+      const selectedEntry = selectCapsuleDrop({
+        userId,
+        day,
+        pullCount: nextPullCount,
+        pullsSinceEpic,
+      });
+      const isNew = inventoryEntries[selectedEntry.id] === undefined;
+      const nextPullsSinceEpic =
+        selectedEntry.rarity === 'epic' ? 0 : pullsSinceEpic + 1;
+
+      if (transaction) {
+        const committed = await applyCapsulePullWithTransaction(
+          transaction,
+          userId,
+          selectedEntry,
+          isNew,
+          nextPullCount,
+          nextPullsSinceEpic
+        );
+
+        if (!committed) {
+          continue;
+        }
+      } else {
+        await applyCapsulePullWithoutTransaction(
+          storage,
+          userId,
+          selectedEntry,
+          isNew,
+          nextPullCount,
+          nextPullsSinceEpic
+        );
+      }
+
+      return {
+        status: 'pulled',
+        pull: createCapsulePull(selectedEntry, isNew),
+        ink: inkBalance - CAPSULE_COST + (isNew ? 0 : DUPLICATE_REFUND),
+        inventory: await loadInventory(storage, userId),
+      };
+    } catch (error) {
+      await discardTransaction(transaction);
+      throw error;
+    }
+  }
+
+  throw new Error('Mystery Ink capsule pull did not settle.');
+};

+api.get('/inventory', async (c) => {
+  const player = await getCurrentPlayer();
+
+  if (!player) {
+    return c.json<Inventory>({ pens: [], titles: [] });
+  }
+

+    return c.json<Inventory>(await loadInventory(redis, player.userId));
+  } catch (error) {
+    console.error('Inventory route failed:', error);
+    return serverError(c, 'The ink drawer is stuck. Try again soon.');
+  }
+});

+api.post('/capsule', async (c) => {
+  const player = await getCurrentPlayer();
+
+  if (!player) {
+    return unauthorized(c, 'Sign in to open a Mystery Ink capsule.');
+  }
+
+  try {
+    const dayNumber = await ensureCurrentArenaDay(redis, new Date());
+    const result = await pullCapsuleForUser(redis, player.userId, dayNumber);
+
+    if (result.status === 'insufficientInk') {
+      return paymentRequired(
+        c,
+        `You need ${CAPSULE_COST} Mystery Ink to open a capsule.`
+      );
+    }
+
+    return c.json<CapsulePull>(result.pull);
+  } catch (error) {
+    console.error('Capsule route failed:', error);
+    return serverError(c, 'The capsule machine jammed. Try again soon.');
+  }
+});

@@ -0,0 +1,405 @@
+import type {
+  CapsulePull,
+  CapsuleRarity,
+  Inventory,
+} from '../../shared/arena';
+import {
+  CAPSULE_COST,
+  CAPSULE_PITY,
+  DUPLICATE_REFUND,
+} from '../../shared/arena';
+import { createSeededNumberGenerator, hashTextToSeed } from './random';
+import type { ArenaStorage } from './scribbit';
+import {
+  INK_CATALOG,
+  INK_PEN_CATALOG,
+  INK_TITLE_CATALOG,
+  type InkCatalogEntry,
+} from './ink';
+
+type InkTransaction = {
+  multi: () => Promise<void>;
+  exec: () => Promise<unknown[]>;
+  discard: () => Promise<void>;
+  unwatch: () => Promise<unknown>;
+  incrBy: (key: string, value: number) => Promise<unknown>;
+  set: (key: string, value: string) => Promise<unknown>;
+  hSet: (key: string, fieldValues: Record<string, string>) => Promise<unknown>;
+};
+
+export type InkStorage = ArenaStorage & {
+  watch?: (...keys: string[]) => Promise<InkTransaction>;
+};
+
+export type CapsulePullSuccess = {
+  status: 'pulled';
+  pull: CapsulePull;
+  ink: number;
+  inventory: Inventory;
+};
+
+export type CapsulePullInsufficientInk = {
+  status: 'insufficientInk';
+  ink: number;
+};
+
+export type CapsulePullResult =
+  | CapsulePullSuccess
+  | CapsulePullInsufficientInk;
+
+type CapsuleSelectionOptions = {
+  userId: string;
+  day: number;
+  pullCount: number;
+  pullsSinceEpic: number;
+};
+
+type InkRewardClaimOptions = {
+  payoutKey: string;
+  payoutField: string;
+  userId: string;
+  amount: number;
+  paidAtMs: number;
+};
+
+const maximumTransactionAttempts = 5;
+
+export const getInkKey = (userId: string): string => {
+  return `ink:${userId}`;
+};
+
+export const getInventoryKey = (userId: string): string => {
+  return `inventory:${userId}`;
+};
+
+export const getPullsSinceEpicKey = (userId: string): string => {
+  return `pullsSinceEpic:${userId}`;
+};
+
+export const getCapsulePullCountKey = (userId: string): string => {
+  return `capsulePulls:${userId}`;
+};
+
+export const getRumbleWinInkPayoutKey = (day: number): string => {
+  return `ink:payout:rumbleWin:${day}`;
+};
+
+const parseStoredNonNegativeInteger = (
+  storedValue: string | undefined
+): number => {
+  if (storedValue === undefined) {
+    return 0;
+  }
+
+  const parsedValue = Number(storedValue);
+  if (!Number.isInteger(parsedValue) || parsedValue < 0) {
+    return 0;
+  }
+
+  return parsedValue;
+};
+
+export const getInkBalance = async (
+  storage: ArenaStorage,
+  userId: string
+): Promise<number> => {
+  return parseStoredNonNegativeInteger(await storage.get(getInkKey(userId)));
+};
+
+export const awardInk = async (
+  storage: ArenaStorage,
+  userId: string,
+  amount: number
+): Promise<number> => {
+  if (!Number.isInteger(amount) || amount <= 0) {
+    return await getInkBalance(storage, userId);
+  }
+
+  return await storage.incrBy(getInkKey(userId), amount);
+};
+
+export const claimInkReward = async (
+  storage: ArenaStorage,
+  options: InkRewardClaimOptions
+): Promise<boolean> => {
+  if (options.amount <= 0) {
+    return false;
+  }
+
+  const createdClaim = await storage.hSetNX(
+    options.payoutKey,
+    options.payoutField,
+    `${options.userId}:${options.amount}:${options.paidAtMs}`
+  );
+
+  if (createdClaim !== 1) {
+    return false;
+  }
+
+  await awardInk(storage, options.userId, options.amount);
+  return true;
+};
+
+export const loadInventory = async (
+  storage: ArenaStorage,
+  userId: string
+): Promise<Inventory> => {
+  const storedInventory = await storage.hGetAll(getInventoryKey(userId));
+
+  return {
+    pens: INK_PEN_CATALOG.filter((entry) => {
+      return storedInventory[entry.id] !== undefined;
+    }).map((entry) => {
+      return entry.id;
+    }),
+    titles: INK_TITLE_CATALOG.filter((entry) => {
+      return storedInventory[entry.id] !== undefined;
+    }).map((entry) => {
+      return entry.id;
+    }),
+  };
+};
+
+export const chooseCapsuleRarity = (roll: number): CapsuleRarity => {
+  if (roll < 0.7) {
+    return 'common';
+  }
+
+  if (roll < 0.95) {
+    return 'rare';
+  }
+
+  return 'epic';
+};
+
+export const isCapsulePityPull = (pullsSinceEpic: number): boolean => {
+  return pullsSinceEpic + 1 >= CAPSULE_PITY;
+};
+
+const chooseEntryForRarity = (
+  rarity: CapsuleRarity,
+  roll: number
+): InkCatalogEntry => {
+  const matchingEntries = INK_CATALOG.filter((entry) => {
+    return entry.rarity === rarity;
+  });
+  const selectedEntry = matchingEntries[Math.floor(roll * matchingEntries.length)];
+
+  if (!selectedEntry) {
+    throw new Error(`No Mystery Ink catalog entries for ${rarity}.`);
+  }
+
+  return selectedEntry;
+};
+
+export const selectCapsuleDrop = (
+  options: CapsuleSelectionOptions
+): InkCatalogEntry => {
+  const seed = hashTextToSeed(
+    `capsule:${options.userId}:${options.day}:${options.pullCount}`
+  );
+  const randomNumber = createSeededNumberGenerator(seed);
+  const rarity = isCapsulePityPull(options.pullsSinceEpic)
+    ? 'epic'
+    : chooseCapsuleRarity(randomNumber());
+
+  return chooseEntryForRarity(rarity, randomNumber());
+};
+
+const createCapsulePull = (
+  entry: InkCatalogEntry,
+  isNew: boolean
+): CapsulePull => {
+  return {
+    rarity: entry.rarity,
+    kind: entry.kind,
+    id: entry.id,
+    name: entry.name,
+    description: entry.description,
+    isNew,
+  };
+};
+
+const unlockInventoryEntry = async (
+  storage: ArenaStorage,
+  userId: string,
+  entry: InkCatalogEntry
+): Promise<void> => {
+  await storage.hSet(getInventoryKey(userId), {
+    [entry.id]: entry.kind,
+  });
+};
+
+const applyCapsulePullWithoutTransaction = async (
+  storage: InkStorage,
+  userId: string,
+  entry: InkCatalogEntry,
+  isNew: boolean,
+  nextPullCount: number,
+  nextPullsSinceEpic: number
+): Promise<void> => {
+  await storage.incrBy(getInkKey(userId), -CAPSULE_COST);
+
+  if (!isNew) {
+    await storage.incrBy(getInkKey(userId), DUPLICATE_REFUND);
+  }
+
+  await storage.set(getCapsulePullCountKey(userId), nextPullCount.toString());
+  await storage.set(
+    getPullsSinceEpicKey(userId),
+    nextPullsSinceEpic.toString()
+  );
+
+  if (isNew) {
+    await unlockInventoryEntry(storage, userId, entry);
+  }
+};
+
+const applyCapsulePullWithTransaction = async (
+  transaction: InkTransaction,
+  userId: string,
+  entry: InkCatalogEntry,
+  isNew: boolean,
+  nextPullCount: number,
+  nextPullsSinceEpic: number
+): Promise<boolean> => {
+  await transaction.multi();
+  await transaction.incrBy(getInkKey(userId), -CAPSULE_COST);
+
+  if (!isNew) {
+    await transaction.incrBy(getInkKey(userId), DUPLICATE_REFUND);
+  }
+
+  await transaction.set(getCapsulePullCountKey(userId), nextPullCount.toString());
+  await transaction.set(
+    getPullsSinceEpicKey(userId),
+    nextPullsSinceEpic.toString()
+  );
+
+  if (isNew) {
+    await transaction.hSet(getInventoryKey(userId), {
+      [entry.id]: entry.kind,
+    });
+  }
+
+  const execResult: unknown = await transaction.exec();
+  return Array.isArray(execResult) && execResult.length > 0;
+};
+
+const discardTransaction = async (
+  transaction: InkTransaction | undefined
+): Promise<void> => {
+  if (!transaction) {
+    return;
+  }
+
+  try {
+    await transaction.discard();
+  } catch (error) {
+    console.warn('Mystery Ink transaction cleanup failed:', error);
+  }
+};
+
+const readPullCount = async (
+  storage: ArenaStorage,
+  userId: string
+): Promise<number> => {
+  return parseStoredNonNegativeInteger(
+    await storage.get(getCapsulePullCountKey(userId))
+  );
+};
+
+const readPullsSinceEpic = async (
+  storage: ArenaStorage,
+  userId: string
+): Promise<number> => {
+  return parseStoredNonNegativeInteger(
+    await storage.get(getPullsSinceEpicKey(userId))
+  );
+};
+
+export const pullCapsuleForUser = async (
+  storage: InkStorage,
+  userId: string,
+  day: number
+): Promise<CapsulePullResult> => {
+  const watchedKeys = [
+    getInkKey(userId),
+    getInventoryKey(userId),
+    getCapsulePullCountKey(userId),
+    getPullsSinceEpicKey(userId),
+  ];
+
+  for (let attempt = 0; attempt < maximumTransactionAttempts; attempt += 1) {
+    let transaction: InkTransaction | undefined;
+
+    try {
+      if (storage.watch) {
+        transaction = await storage.watch(...watchedKeys);
+      }
+
+      const inkBalance = await getInkBalance(storage, userId);
+
+      if (inkBalance < CAPSULE_COST) {
+        if (transaction) {
+          await transaction.unwatch();
+        }
+
+        return {
+          status: 'insufficientInk',
+          ink: inkBalance,
+        };
+      }
+
+      const pullCount = await readPullCount(storage, userId);
+      const pullsSinceEpic = await readPullsSinceEpic(storage, userId);
+      const inventoryEntries = await storage.hGetAll(getInventoryKey(userId));
+      const nextPullCount = pullCount + 1;
+      const selectedEntry = selectCapsuleDrop({
+        userId,
+        day,
+        pullCount: nextPullCount,
+        pullsSinceEpic,
+      });
+      const isNew = inventoryEntries[selectedEntry.id] === undefined;
+      const nextPullsSinceEpic =
+        selectedEntry.rarity === 'epic' ? 0 : pullsSinceEpic + 1;
+
+      if (transaction) {
+        const committed = await applyCapsulePullWithTransaction(
+          transaction,
+          userId,
+          selectedEntry,
+          isNew,
+          nextPullCount,
+          nextPullsSinceEpic
+        );
+
+        if (!committed) {
+          continue;
+        }
+      } else {
+        await applyCapsulePullWithoutTransaction(
+          storage,
+          userId,
+          selectedEntry,
+          isNew,
+          nextPullCount,
+          nextPullsSinceEpic
+        );
+      }
+
+      return {
+        status: 'pulled',
+        pull: createCapsulePull(selectedEntry, isNew),
+        ink: inkBalance - CAPSULE_COST + (isNew ? 0 : DUPLICATE_REFUND),
+        inventory: await loadInventory(storage, userId),
+      };
+    } catch (error) {
+      await discardTransaction(transaction);
+      throw error;
+    }
+  }
+
+  throw new Error('Mystery Ink capsule pull did not settle.');
+};

+api.get('/inventory', async (c) => {
+  const player = await getCurrentPlayer();
+

+    return c.json<Inventory>({ pens: [], titles: [] });
+  }

+    return c.json<Inventory>(await loadInventory(redis, player.userId));

+api.post('/capsule', async (c) => {
+  const player = await getCurrentPlayer();
+
+  if (!player) {
+    return unauthorized(c, 'Sign in to open a Mystery Ink capsule.');
+  }
+
+  try {
+    const dayNumber = await ensureCurrentArenaDay(redis, new Date());
+    const result = await pullCapsuleForUser(redis, player.userId, dayNumber);
+
+    if (result.status === 'insufficientInk') {
+      return paymentRequired(
+        c,
+        `You need ${CAPSULE_COST} Mystery Ink to open a capsule.`
+      );
+    }
+
+    return c.json<CapsulePull>(result.pull);
+  } catch (error) {
+    console.error('Capsule route failed:', error);
+    return serverError(c, 'The capsule machine jammed. Try again soon.');
+  }
+});

+    }

+import {
+  INK_CATALOG,
+  INK_PEN_CATALOG,
+  INK_TITLE_CATALOG,
+  type InkCatalogEntry,
+} from './ink';
+
+type InkTransaction = {
+  multi: () => Promise<void>;
+  exec: () => Promise<unknown[]>;
+  discard: () => Promise<void>;
+  unwatch: () => Promise<unknown>;
+  incrBy: (key: string, value: number) => Promise<unknown>;
+  set: (key: string, value: string) => Promise<unknown>;
+  hSet: (key: string, fieldValues: Record<string, string>) => Promise<unknown>;
+};
+
+export type InkStorage = ArenaStorage & {
+  watch?: (...keys: string[]) => Promise<InkTransaction>;
+};
+
+export type CapsulePullSuccess = {
+  status: 'pulled';
+  pull: CapsulePull;
+  ink: number;
+  inventory: Inventory;
+};
+
+export type CapsulePullInsufficientInk = {
+  status: 'insufficientInk';
+  ink: number;
+};
+
+export type CapsulePullResult =
+  | CapsulePullSuccess
+  | CapsulePullInsufficientInk;
+
+type CapsuleSelectionOptions = {
+  userId: string;
+  day: number;
+  pullCount: number;
+  pullsSinceEpic: number;
+};
+
+type InkRewardClaimOptions = {
+  payoutKey: string;
+  payoutField: string;
+  userId: string;
+  amount: number;
+  paidAtMs: number;
+};
+
+const maximumTransactionAttempts = 5;
+
+export const getInkKey = (userId: string): string => {
+  return `ink:${userId}`;
+};
+
+export const getInventoryKey = (userId: string): string => {
+  return `inventory:${userId}`;
+};
+
+export const getPullsSinceEpicKey = (userId: string): string => {
+  return `pullsSinceEpic:${userId}`;
+};
+
+export const getCapsulePullCountKey = (userId: string): string => {
+  return `capsulePulls:${userId}`;
+};
+
+export const getRumbleWinInkPayoutKey = (day: number): string => {
+  return `ink:payout:rumbleWin:${day}`;
+};
+
+const parseStoredNonNegativeInteger = (
+  storedValue: string | undefined
+): number => {
+  if (storedValue === undefined) {
+    return 0;
+  }
+
+  const parsedValue = Number(storedValue);
+  if (!Number.isInteger(parsedValue) || parsedValue < 0) {
+    return 0;
+  }
+
+  return parsedValue;
+};
+
+export const getInkBalance = async (
+  storage: ArenaStorage,
+  userId: string
+): Promise<number> => {
+  return parseStoredNonNegativeInteger(await storage.get(getInkKey(userId)));
+};
+
+export const awardInk = async (
+  storage: ArenaStorage,
+  userId: string,
+  amount: number
+): Promise<number> => {
+  if (!Number.isInteger(amount) || amount <= 0) {
+    return await getInkBalance(storage, userId);
+  }
+
+  return await storage.incrBy(getInkKey(userId), amount);
+};
+
+export const claimInkReward = async (
+  storage: ArenaStorage,
+  options: InkRewardClaimOptions
+): Promise<boolean> => {
+  if (options.amount <= 0) {
+    return false;
+  }
+
+  const createdClaim = await storage.hSetNX(
+    options.payoutKey,
+    options.payoutField,
+    `${options.userId}:${options.amount}:${options.paidAtMs}`
+  );
+
+  if (createdClaim !== 1) {
+    return false;
+  }
+
+  await awardInk(storage, options.userId, options.amount);
+  return true;
+};
+
+export const loadInventory = async (
+  storage: ArenaStorage,
+  userId: string
+): Promise<Inventory> => {
+  const storedInventory = await storage.hGetAll(getInventoryKey(userId));
+
+  return {
+    pens: INK_PEN_CATALOG.filter((entry) => {
+      return storedInventory[entry.id] !== undefined;
+    }).map((entry) => {
+      return entry.id;
+    }),
+    titles: INK_TITLE_CATALOG.filter((entry) => {
+      return storedInventory[entry.id] !== undefined;
+    }).map((entry) => {
+      return entry.id;
+    }),
+  };
+};
+
+export const chooseCapsuleRarity = (roll: number): CapsuleRarity => {
+  if (roll < 0.7) {
+    return 'common';
+  }
+
+  if (roll < 0.95) {
+    return 'rare';
+  }
+
+  return 'epic';
+};
+
+export const isCapsulePityPull = (pullsSinceEpic: number): boolean => {
+  return pullsSinceEpic + 1 >= CAPSULE_PITY;
+};
+
+const chooseEntryForRarity = (
+  rarity: CapsuleRarity,
+  roll: number
+): InkCatalogEntry => {
+  const matchingEntries = INK_CATALOG.filter((entry) => {
+    return entry.rarity === rarity;
+  });
+  const selectedEntry = matchingEntries[Math.floor(roll * matchingEntries.length)];
+
+  if (!selectedEntry) {
+    throw new Error(`No Mystery Ink catalog entries for ${rarity}.`);
+  }
+
+  return selectedEntry;
+};
+
+export const selectCapsuleDrop = (
+  options: CapsuleSelectionOptions
+): InkCatalogEntry => {
+  const seed = hashTextToSeed(
+    `capsule:${options.userId}:${options.day}:${options.pullCount}`
+  );
+  const randomNumber = createSeededNumberGenerator(seed);
+  const rarity = isCapsulePityPull(options.pullsSinceEpic)
+    ? 'epic'
+    : chooseCapsuleRarity(randomNumber());
+
+  return chooseEntryForRarity(rarity, randomNumber());
+};
+
+const createCapsulePull = (
+  entry: InkCatalogEntry,
+  isNew: boolean
+): CapsulePull => {
+  return {
+    rarity: entry.rarity,
+    kind: entry.kind,
+    id: entry.id,
+    name: entry.name,
+    description: entry.description,
+    isNew,
+  };
+};
+
+const unlockInventoryEntry = async (
+  storage: ArenaStorage,
+  userId: string,
+  entry: InkCatalogEntry
+): Promise<void> => {
+  await storage.hSet(getInventoryKey(userId), {
+    [entry.id]: entry.kind,
+  });
+};
+
+const applyCapsulePullWithoutTransaction = async (
+  storage: InkStorage,
+  userId: string,
+  entry: InkCatalogEntry,
+  isNew: boolean,
+  nextPullCount: number,
+  nextPullsSinceEpic: number
+): Promise<void> => {
+  await storage.incrBy(getInkKey(userId), -CAPSULE_COST);
+
+  if (!isNew) {
+    await storage.incrBy(getInkKey(userId), DUPLICATE_REFUND);
+  }
+
+  await storage.set(getCapsulePullCountKey(userId), nextPullCount.toString());
+  await storage.set(
+    getPullsSinceEpicKey(userId),
+    nextPullsSinceEpic.toString()
+  );
+
+  if (isNew) {
+    await unlockInventoryEntry(storage, userId, entry);
+  }
+};
+
+const applyCapsulePullWithTransaction = async (
+  transaction: InkTransaction,
+  userId: string,
+  entry: InkCatalogEntry,
+  isNew: boolean,
+  nextPullCount: number,
+  nextPullsSinceEpic: number
+): Promise<boolean> => {
+  await transaction.multi();
+  await transaction.incrBy(getInkKey(userId), -CAPSULE_COST);
+
+  if (!isNew) {
+    await transaction.incrBy(getInkKey(userId), DUPLICATE_REFUND);
+  }
+
+  await transaction.set(getCapsulePullCountKey(userId), nextPullCount.toString());
+  await transaction.set(
+    getPullsSinceEpicKey(userId),
+    nextPullsSinceEpic.toString()
+  );
+
+  if (isNew) {
+    await transaction.hSet(getInventoryKey(userId), {
+      [entry.id]: entry.kind,
+    });
+  }
+
+  const execResult: unknown = await transaction.exec();
+  return Array.isArray(execResult) && execResult.length > 0;
+};
+
+const discardTransaction = async (
+  transaction: InkTransaction | undefined
+): Promise<void> => {
+  if (!transaction) {
+    return;
+  }
+
+  try {
+    await transaction.discard();
+  } catch (error) {
+    console.warn('Mystery Ink transaction cleanup failed:', error);
+  }
+};
+
+const readPullCount = async (
+  storage: ArenaStorage,
+  userId: string
+): Promise<number> => {
+  return parseStoredNonNegativeInteger(
+    await storage.get(getCapsulePullCountKey(userId))
+  );
+};
+
+const readPullsSinceEpic = async (
+  storage: ArenaStorage,
+  userId: string
+): Promise<number> => {
+  return parseStoredNonNegativeInteger(
+    await storage.get(getPullsSinceEpicKey(userId))
+  );
+};
+
+export const pullCapsuleForUser = async (
+  storage: InkStorage,
+  userId: string,
+  day: number
+): Promise<CapsulePullResult> => {
+  const watchedKeys = [
+    getInkKey(userId),
+    getInventoryKey(userId),
+    getCapsulePullCountKey(userId),
+    getPullsSinceEpicKey(userId),
+  ];
+
+  for (let attempt = 0; attempt < maximumTransactionAttempts; attempt += 1) {
+    let transaction: InkTransaction | undefined;
+
+    try {
+      if (storage.watch) {
+        transaction = await storage.watch(...watchedKeys);
+      }
+
+      const inkBalance = await getInkBalance(storage, userId);
+
+      if (inkBalance < CAPSULE_COST) {
+        if (transaction) {
+          await transaction.unwatch();
+        }
+
+        return {
+          status: 'insufficientInk',
+          ink: inkBalance,
+        };
+      }
+
+      const pullCount = await readPullCount(storage, userId);
+      const pullsSinceEpic = await readPullsSinceEpic(storage, userId);
+      const inventoryEntries = await storage.hGetAll(getInventoryKey(userId));
+      const nextPullCount = pullCount + 1;
+      const selectedEntry = selectCapsuleDrop({
+        userId,
+        day,
+        pullCount: nextPullCount,
+        pullsSinceEpic,
+      });
+      const isNew = inventoryEntries[selectedEntry.id] === undefined;
+      const nextPullsSinceEpic =
+        selectedEntry.rarity === 'epic' ? 0 : pullsSinceEpic + 1;
+
+      if (transaction) {
+        const committed = await applyCapsulePullWithTransaction(
+          transaction,
+          userId,
+          selectedEntry,
+          isNew,
+          nextPullCount,
+          nextPullsSinceEpic
+        );
+
+        if (!committed) {
+          continue;
+        }
+      } else {
+        await applyCapsulePullWithoutTransaction(
+          storage,
+          userId,
+          selectedEntry,
+          isNew,
+          nextPullCount,
+          nextPullsSinceEpic
+        );
+      }
+
+      return {
+        status: 'pulled',
+        pull: createCapsulePull(selectedEntry, isNew),
+        ink: inkBalance - CAPSULE_COST + (isNew ? 0 : DUPLICATE_REFUND),
+        inventory: await loadInventory(storage, userId),
+      };
+    } catch (error) {
+      await discardTransaction(transaction);
+      throw error;
+    }
+  }
+
+  throw new Error('Mystery Ink capsule pull did not settle.');
+};

+api.get('/inventory', async (c) => {
+  const player = await getCurrentPlayer();
+
+  if (!player) {
+    return c.json<Inventory>({ pens: [], titles: [] });
+  }
+
+  try {
+    return c.json<Inventory>(await loadInventory(redis, player.userId));
+  } catch (error) {
+    console.error('Inventory route failed:', error);
+    return serverError(c, 'The ink drawer is stuck. Try again soon.');
+  }
+});

+api.post('/capsule', async (c) => {
+  const player = await getCurrentPlayer();
+
+  if (!player) {
+    return unauthorized(c, 'Sign in to open a Mystery Ink capsule.');
+  }
+
+  try {
+    const dayNumber = await ensureCurrentArenaDay(redis, new Date());
+    const result = await pullCapsuleForUser(redis, player.userId, dayNumber);
+
+    if (result.status === 'insufficientInk') {
+      return paymentRequired(
+        c,
+        `You need ${CAPSULE_COST} Mystery Ink to open a capsule.`
+      );
+    }
+
+    return c.json<CapsulePull>(result.pull);
+  } catch (error) {
+    console.error('Capsule route failed:', error);
+    return serverError(c, 'The capsule machine jammed. Try again soon.');
+  }
+});

+  },
+];
+
+export const INK_TITLE_CATALOG: InkTitleCatalogEntry[] = [
+  {
+    id: 'doodler',
+    kind: 'title',
+    rarity: 'common',
+    name: 'Doodler',
+    description: 'A humble badge for brave scribblers with messy hands.',
+  },
+  {
+    id: 'inkslinger',
+    kind: 'title',
+    rarity: 'common',
+    name: 'Inkslinger',
+    description: 'For artists who draw first and explain the stain later.',
+  },
+  {
+    id: 'brushlord',
+    kind: 'title',
+    rarity: 'rare',
+    name: 'Brushlord',
+    description: 'A fancy title for commanding one very loyal brush.',
+  },
+  {
+    id: 'the-pen-ultimate',
+    kind: 'title',
+    rarity: 'epic',
+    name: 'The Pen Ultimate',
+    description: 'The final form of stationery-based confidence.',
+  },
+];
+
+export const INK_CATALOG: InkCatalogEntry[] = [
+  ...INK_PEN_CATALOG,
+  ...INK_TITLE_CATALOG,
+];
diff --git a/app/src/server/core/inkStore.ts b/app/src/server/core/inkStore.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..71ab40b4ec9faf24565912019771eeb64f45b308

@@ -0,0 +1,405 @@
+import type {
+  CapsulePull,
+  CapsuleRarity,
+  Inventory,
+} from '../../shared/arena';
+import {
+  CAPSULE_COST,
+  CAPSULE_PITY,
+  DUPLICATE_REFUND,
+} from '../../shared/arena';
+import { createSeededNumberGenerator, hashTextToSeed } from './random';
+import type { ArenaStorage } from './scribbit';
+import {
+  INK_CATALOG,
+  INK_PEN_CATALOG,
+  INK_TITLE_CATALOG,
+  type InkCatalogEntry,
+} from './ink';
+
+type InkTransaction = {
+  multi: () => Promise<void>;
+  exec: () => Promise<unknown[]>;
+  discard: () => Promise<void>;
+  unwatch: () => Promise<unknown>;
+  incrBy: (key: string, value: number) => Promise<unknown>;
+  set: (key: string, value: string) => Promise<unknown>;
+  hSet: (key: string, fieldValues: Record<string, string>) => Promise<unknown>;
+};
+
+export type InkStorage = ArenaStorage & {
+  watch?: (...keys: string[]) => Promise<InkTransaction>;
+};
+
+export type CapsulePullSuccess = {
+  status: 'pulled';
+  pull: CapsulePull;
+  ink: number;
+  inventory: Inventory;
+};
+
+export type CapsulePullInsufficientInk = {
+  status: 'insufficientInk';
+  ink: number;
+};
+
+export type CapsulePullResult =
+  | CapsulePullSuccess
+  | CapsulePullInsufficientInk;
+
+type CapsuleSelectionOptions = {
+  userId: string;
+  day: number;
+  pullCount: number;
+  pullsSinceEpic: number;
+};
+
+type InkRewardClaimOptions = {
+  payoutKey: string;
+  payoutField: string;
+  userId: string;
+  amount: number;
+  paidAtMs: number;
+};
+
+const maximumTransactionAttempts = 5;
+
+export const getInkKey = (userId: string): string => {
+  return `ink:${userId}`;
+};
+
+export const getInventoryKey = (userId: string): string => {
+  return `inventory:${userId}`;
+};
+
+export const getPullsSinceEpicKey = (userId: string): string => {
+  return `pullsSinceEpic:${userId}`;
+};
+
+export const getCapsulePullCountKey = (userId: string): string => {
+  return `capsulePulls:${userId}`;
+};
+
+export const getRumbleWinInkPayoutKey = (day: number): string => {
+  return `ink:payout:rumbleWin:${day}`;
+};
+
+const parseStoredNonNegativeInteger = (
+  storedValue: string | undefined
+): number => {
+  if (storedValue === undefined) {
+    return 0;
+  }
+
+  const parsedValue = Number(storedValue);
+  if (!Number.isInteger(parsedValue) || parsedValue < 0) {
+    return 0;
+  }
+
+  return parsedValue;
+};
+
+export const getInkBalance = async (
+  storage: ArenaStorage,
+  userId: string
+): Promise<number> => {
+  return parseStoredNonNegativeInteger(await storage.get(getInkKey(userId)));
+};
+
+export const awardInk = async (
+  storage: ArenaStorage,
+  userId: string,
+  amount: number
+): Promise<number> => {
+  if (!Number.isInteger(amount) || amount <= 0) {
+    return await getInkBalance(storage, userId);
+  }
+
+  return await storage.incrBy(getInkKey(userId), amount);
+};
+
+export const claimInkReward = async (
+  storage: ArenaStorage,
+  options: InkRewardClaimOptions
+): Promise<boolean> => {
+  if (options.amount <= 0) {
+    return false;
+  }
+
+  const createdClaim = await storage.hSetNX(
+    options.payoutKey,
+    options.payoutField,
+    `${options.userId}:${options.amount}:${options.paidAtMs}`
+  );
+
+  if (createdClaim !== 1) {
+    return false;
+  }
+
+  await awardInk(storage, options.userId, options.amount);
+  return true;
+};
+
+export const loadInventory = async (
+  storage: ArenaStorage,
+  userId: string
+): Promise<Inventory> => {
+  const storedInventory = await storage.hGetAll(getInventoryKey(userId));
+
+  return {
+    pens: INK_PEN_CATALOG.filter((entry) => {
+      return storedInventory[entry.id] !== undefined;
+    }).map((entry) => {
+      return entry.id;
+    }),
+    titles: INK_TITLE_CATALOG.filter((entry) => {
+      return storedInventory[entry.id] !== undefined;
+    }).map((entry) => {
+      return entry.id;
+    }),
+  };
+};
+
+export const chooseCapsuleRarity = (roll: number): CapsuleRarity => {
+  if (roll < 0.7) {
+    return 'common';
+  }
+
+  if (roll < 0.95) {
+    return 'rare';
+  }
+
+  return 'epic';
+};
+
+export const isCapsulePityPull = (pullsSinceEpic: number): boolean => {
+  return pullsSinceEpic + 1 >= CAPSULE_PITY;
+};
+
+const chooseEntryForRarity = (
+  rarity: CapsuleRarity,
+  roll: number
+): InkCatalogEntry => {
+  const matchingEntries = INK_CATALOG.filter((entry) => {
+    return entry.rarity === rarity;
+  });
+  const selectedEntry = matchingEntries[Math.floor(roll * matchingEntries.length)];
+
+  if (!selectedEntry) {
+    throw new Error(`No Mystery Ink catalog entries for ${rarity}.`);
+  }
+
+  return selectedEntry;
+};
+
+export const selectCapsuleDrop = (
+  options: CapsuleSelectionOptions
+): InkCatalogEntry => {
+  const seed = hashTextToSeed(
+    `capsule:${options.userId}:${options.day}:${options.pullCount}`
+  );
+  const randomNumber = createSeededNumberGenerator(seed);
+  const rarity = isCapsulePityPull(options.pullsSinceEpic)
+    ? 'epic'
+    : chooseCapsuleRarity(randomNumber());
+
+  return chooseEntryForRarity(rarity, randomNumber());
+};
+
+const createCapsulePull = (
+  entry: InkCatalogEntry,
+  isNew: boolean
+): CapsulePull => {
+  return {
+    rarity: entry.rarity,
+    kind: entry.kind,
+    id: entry.id,
+    name: entry.name,
+    description: entry.description,
+    isNew,
+  };
+};
+
+const unlockInventoryEntry = async (
+  storage: ArenaStorage,
+  userId: string,
+  entry: InkCatalogEntry
+): Promise<void> => {
+  await storage.hSet(getInventoryKey(userId), {
+    [entry.id]: entry.kind,
+  });
+};
+
+const applyCapsulePullWithoutTransaction = async (
+  storage: InkStorage,
+  userId: string,
+  entry: InkCatalogEntry,
+  isNew: boolean,
+  nextPullCount: number,
+  nextPullsSinceEpic: number
+): Promise<void> => {
+  await storage.incrBy(getInkKey(userId), -CAPSULE_COST);
+
+  if (!isNew) {
+    await storage.incrBy(getInkKey(userId), DUPLICATE_REFUND);
+  }
+
+  await storage.set(getCapsulePullCountKey(userId), nextPullCount.toString());
+  await storage.set(
+    getPullsSinceEpicKey(userId),
+    nextPullsSinceEpic.toString()
+  );
+
+  if (isNew) {
+    await unlockInventoryEntry(storage, userId, entry);
+  }
+};
+
+const applyCapsulePullWithTransaction = async (
+  transaction: InkTransaction,
+  userId: string,
+  entry: InkCatalogEntry,
+  isNew: boolean,
+  nextPullCount: number,
+  nextPullsSinceEpic: number
+): Promise<boolean> => {
+  await transaction.multi();
+  await transaction.incrBy(getInkKey(userId), -CAPSULE_COST);
+
+  if (!isNew) {
+    await transaction.incrBy(getInkKey(userId), DUPLICATE_REFUND);
+  }
+
+  await transaction.set(getCapsulePullCountKey(userId), nextPullCount.toString());
+  await transaction.set(
+    getPullsSinceEpicKey(userId),
+    nextPullsSinceEpic.toString()
+  );
+
+  if (isNew) {
+    await transaction.hSet(getInventoryKey(userId), {
+      [entry.id]: entry.kind,
+    });
+  }
+
+  const execResult: unknown = await transaction.exec();
+  return Array.isArray(execResult) && execResult.length > 0;
+};
+
+const discardTransaction = async (
+  transaction: InkTransaction | undefined
+): Promise<void> => {
+  if (!transaction) {
+    return;
+  }
+
+  try {
+    await transaction.discard();
+  } catch (error) {
+    console.warn('Mystery Ink transaction cleanup failed:', error);
+  }
+};
+
+const readPullCount = async (
+  storage: ArenaStorage,
+  userId: string
+): Promise<number> => {
+  return parseStoredNonNegativeInteger(
+    await storage.get(getCapsulePullCountKey(userId))
+  );
+};
+
+const readPullsSinceEpic = async (
+  storage: ArenaStorage,
+  userId: string
+): Promise<number> => {
+  return parseStoredNonNegativeInteger(
+    await storage.get(getPullsSinceEpicKey(userId))
+  );
+};
+
+export const pullCapsuleForUser = async (
+  storage: InkStorage,
+  userId: string,
+  day: number
+): Promise<CapsulePullResult> => {
+  const watchedKeys = [
+    getInkKey(userId),
+    getInventoryKey(userId),
+    getCapsulePullCountKey(userId),
+    getPullsSinceEpicKey(userId),
+  ];
+
+  for (let attempt = 0; attempt < maximumTransactionAttempts; attempt += 1) {
+    let transaction: InkTransaction | undefined;
+
+    try {
+      if (storage.watch) {
+        transaction = await storage.watch(...watchedKeys);
+      }
+
+      const inkBalance = await getInkBalance(storage, userId);
+
+      if (inkBalance < CAPSULE_COST) {
+        if (transaction) {
+          await transaction.unwatch();
+        }
+
+        return {
+          status: 'insufficientInk',
+          ink: inkBalance,
+        };
+      }
+
+      const pullCount = await readPullCount(storage, userId);
+      const pullsSinceEpic = await readPullsSinceEpic(storage, userId);
+      const inventoryEntries = await storage.hGetAll(getInventoryKey(userId));
+      const nextPullCount = pullCount + 1;
+      const selectedEntry = selectCapsuleDrop({
+        userId,
+        day,
+        pullCount: nextPullCount,
+        pullsSinceEpic,
+      });
+      const isNew = inventoryEntries[selectedEntry.id] === undefined;
+      const nextPullsSinceEpic =
+        selectedEntry.rarity === 'epic' ? 0 : pullsSinceEpic + 1;
+
+      if (transaction) {
+        const committed = await applyCapsulePullWithTransaction(
+          transaction,
+          userId,
+          selectedEntry,
+          isNew,
+          nextPullCount,
+          nextPullsSinceEpic
+        );
+
+        if (!committed) {
+          continue;
+        }
+      } else {
+        await applyCapsulePullWithoutTransaction(
+          storage,
+          userId,
+          selectedEntry,
+          isNew,
+          nextPullCount,
+          nextPullsSinceEpic
+        );
+      }
+
+      return {
+        status: 'pulled',
+        pull: createCapsulePull(selectedEntry, isNew),
+        ink: inkBalance - CAPSULE_COST + (isNew ? 0 : DUPLICATE_REFUND),
+        inventory: await loadInventory(storage, userId),
+      };
+    } catch (error) {
+      await discardTransaction(transaction);
+      throw error;
+    }
+  }
+
+  throw new Error('Mystery Ink capsule pull did not settle.');
+};

+api.get('/inventory', async (c) => {
+  const player = await getCurrentPlayer();
+
+  if (!player) {
+    return c.json<Inventory>({ pens: [], titles: [] });
+  }
+
+  try {
+    return c.json<Inventory>(await loadInventory(redis, player.userId));
+  } catch (error) {
+    console.error('Inventory route failed:', error);
+    return serverError(c, 'The ink drawer is stuck. Try again soon.');
+  }
+});

+api.post('/capsule', async (c) => {
+  const player = await getCurrentPlayer();
+
+  if (!player) {
+    return unauthorized(c, 'Sign in to open a Mystery Ink capsule.');
+  }
+
+  try {
+    const dayNumber = await ensureCurrentArenaDay(redis, new Date());
+    const result = await pullCapsuleForUser(redis, player.userId, dayNumber);
+
+    if (result.status === 'insufficientInk') {
+      return paymentRequired(
+        c,
+        `You need ${CAPSULE_COST} Mystery Ink to open a capsule.`
+      );
+    }
+
+    return c.json<CapsulePull>(result.pull);
+  } catch (error) {
+    console.error('Capsule route failed:', error);
+    return serverError(c, 'The capsule machine jammed. Try again soon.');
+  }
+});

     1	import type { CapsuleRarity } from '../../shared/arena';

     1	import type {
     2	  CapsulePull,
     3	  CapsuleRarity,
     4	  Inventory,
     5	} from '../../shared/arena';
     6	import {
     7	  CAPSULE_COST,
     8	  CAPSULE_PITY,
     9	  DUPLICATE_REFUND,
    10	} from '../../shared/arena';
    11	import { createSeededNumberGenerator, hashTextToSeed } from './random';
    12	import type { ArenaStorage } from './scribbit';
    13	import {
    14	  INK_CATALOG,
    15	  INK_PEN_CATALOG,
    16	  INK_TITLE_CATALOG,
    17	  type InkCatalogEntry,
    18	} from './ink';
    19	
    20	type InkTransaction = {
    21	  multi: () => Promise<void>;
    22	  exec: () => Promise<unknown[]>;
    23	  discard: () => Promise<void>;
    24	  unwatch: () => Promise<unknown>;
    25	  incrBy: (key: string, value: number) => Promise<unknown>;
    26	  set: (key: string, value: string) => Promise<unknown>;
    27	  hSet: (key: string, fieldValues: Record<string, string>) => Promise<unknown>;
    28	};
    29	
    30	export type InkStorage = ArenaStorage & {
    31	  watch?: (...keys: string[]) => Promise<InkTransaction>;
    32	};
    33	
    34	export type CapsulePullSuccess = {
    35	  status: 'pulled';
    36	  pull: CapsulePull;
    37	  ink: number;
    38	  inventory: Inventory;
    39	};
    40	
    41	export type CapsulePullInsufficientInk = {
    42	  status: 'insufficientInk';
    43	  ink: number;
    44	};
    45	
    46	export type CapsulePullResult =
    47	  | CapsulePullSuccess
    48	  | CapsulePullInsufficientInk;
    49	
    50	type CapsuleSelectionOptions = {
    51	  userId: string;
    52	  day: number;
    53	  pullCount: number;
    54	  pullsSinceEpic: number;
    55	};
    56	
    57	type InkRewardClaimOptions = {
    58	  payoutKey: string;
    59	  payoutField: string;
    60	  userId: string;
    61	  amount: number;
    62	  paidAtMs: number;
    63	};
    64	
    65	const maximumTransactionAttempts = 5;
    66	
    67	export const getInkKey = (userId: string): string => {
    68	  return `ink:${userId}`;
    69	};
    70	
    71	export const getInventoryKey = (userId: string): string => {
    72	  return `inventory:${userId}`;
    73	};
    74	
    75	export const getPullsSinceEpicKey = (userId: string): string => {
    76	  return `pullsSinceEpic:${userId}`;
    77	};
    78	
    79	export const getCapsulePullCountKey = (userId: string): string => {
    80	  return `capsulePulls:${userId}`;
    81	};
    82	
    83	export const getRumbleWinInkPayoutKey = (day: number): string => {
    84	  return `ink:payout:rumbleWin:${day}`;
    85	};
    86	
    87	const parseStoredNonNegativeInteger = (
    88	  storedValue: string | undefined
    89	): number => {
    90	  if (storedValue === undefined) {
    91	    return 0;
    92	  }
    93	
    94	  const parsedValue = Number(storedValue);
    95	  if (!Number.isInteger(parsedValue) || parsedValue < 0) {
    96	    return 0;
    97	  }
    98	
    99	  return parsedValue;
   100	};
   101	
   102	export const getInkBalance = async (
   103	  storage: ArenaStorage,
   104	  userId: string
   105	): Promise<number> => {
   106	  return parseStoredNonNegativeInteger(await storage.get(getInkKey(userId)));
   107	};
   108	
   109	export const awardInk = async (
   110	  storage: ArenaStorage,
   111	  userId: string,
   112	  amount: number
   113	): Promise<number> => {
   114	  if (!Number.isInteger(amount) || amount <= 0) {
   115	    return await getInkBalance(storage, userId);
   116	  }
   117	
   118	  return await storage.incrBy(getInkKey(userId), amount);
   119	};
   120	
   121	export const claimInkReward = async (
   122	  storage: ArenaStorage,
   123	  options: InkRewardClaimOptions
   124	): Promise<boolean> => {
   125	  if (options.amount <= 0) {
   126	    return false;
   127	  }
   128	
   129	  const createdClaim = await storage.hSetNX(
   130	    options.payoutKey,
   131	    options.payoutField,
   132	    `${options.userId}:${options.amount}:${options.paidAtMs}`
   133	  );
   134	
   135	  if (createdClaim !== 1) {
   136	    return false;
   137	  }
   138	
   139	  await awardInk(storage, options.userId, options.amount);
   140	  return true;
   141	};
   142	
   143	export const loadInventory = async (
   144	  storage: ArenaStorage,
   145	  userId: string
   146	): Promise<Inventory> => {
   147	  const storedInventory = await storage.hGetAll(getInventoryKey(userId));
   148	
   149	  return {
   150	    pens: INK_PEN_CATALOG.filter((entry) => {
   151	      return storedInventory[entry.id] !== undefined;
   152	    }).map((entry) => {
   153	      return entry.id;
   154	    }),
   155	    titles: INK_TITLE_CATALOG.filter((entry) => {
   156	      return storedInventory[entry.id] !== undefined;
   157	    }).map((entry) => {
   158	      return entry.id;
   159	    }),
   160	  };
   161	};
   162	
   163	export const chooseCapsuleRarity = (roll: number): CapsuleRarity => {
   164	  if (roll < 0.7) {
   165	    return 'common';
   166	  }
   167	
   168	  if (roll < 0.95) {
   169	    return 'rare';
   170	  }
   171	
   172	  return 'epic';
   173	};
   174	
   175	export const isCapsulePityPull = (pullsSinceEpic: number): boolean => {
   176	  return pullsSinceEpic + 1 >= CAPSULE_PITY;
   177	};
   178	
   179	const chooseEntryForRarity = (
   180	  rarity: CapsuleRarity,
   181	  roll: number
   182	): InkCatalogEntry => {
   183	  const matchingEntries = INK_CATALOG.filter((entry) => {
   184	    return entry.rarity === rarity;
   185	  });
   186	  const selectedEntry = matchingEntries[Math.floor(roll * matchingEntries.length)];
   187	
   188	  if (!selectedEntry) {
   189	    throw new Error(`No Mystery Ink catalog entries for ${rarity}.`);
   190	  }
   191	
   192	  return selectedEntry;
   193	};
   194	
   195	export const selectCapsuleDrop = (
   196	  options: CapsuleSelectionOptions
   197	): InkCatalogEntry => {
   198	  const seed = hashTextToSeed(
   199	    `capsule:${options.userId}:${options.day}:${options.pullCount}`
   200	  );
   201	  const randomNumber = createSeededNumberGenerator(seed);
   202	  const rarity = isCapsulePityPull(options.pullsSinceEpic)
   203	    ? 'epic'
   204	    : chooseCapsuleRarity(randomNumber());
   205	
   206	  return chooseEntryForRarity(rarity, randomNumber());
   207	};
   208	
   209	const createCapsulePull = (
   210	  entry: InkCatalogEntry,
   211	  isNew: boolean
   212	): CapsulePull => {
   213	  return {
   214	    rarity: entry.rarity,
   215	    kind: entry.kind,
   216	    id: entry.id,
   217	    name: entry.name,
   218	    description: entry.description,
   219	    isNew,
   220	  };
   221	};
   222	
   223	const unlockInventoryEntry = async (
   224	  storage: ArenaStorage,
   225	  userId: string,
   226	  entry: InkCatalogEntry
   227	): Promise<void> => {
   228	  await storage.hSet(getInventoryKey(userId), {
   229	    [entry.id]: entry.kind,
   230	  });
   231	};
   232	
   233	const applyCapsulePullWithoutTransaction = async (
   234	  storage: InkStorage,
   235	  userId: string,
   236	  entry: InkCatalogEntry,
   237	  isNew: boolean,
   238	  nextPullCount: number,
   239	  nextPullsSinceEpic: number
   240	): Promise<void> => {
   241	  await storage.incrBy(getInkKey(userId), -CAPSULE_COST);
   242	
   243	  if (!isNew) {
   244	    await storage.incrBy(getInkKey(userId), DUPLICATE_REFUND);
   245	  }
   246	
   247	  await storage.set(getCapsulePullCountKey(userId), nextPullCount.toString());
   248	  await storage.set(
   249	    getPullsSinceEpicKey(userId),
   250	    nextPullsSinceEpic.toString()
   251	  );
   252	
   253	  if (isNew) {
   254	    await unlockInventoryEntry(storage, userId, entry);
   255	  }
   256	};
   257	
   258	const applyCapsulePullWithTransaction = async (
   259	  transaction: InkTransaction,
   260	  userId: string,
   261	  entry: InkCatalogEntry,
   262	  isNew: boolean,
   263	  nextPullCount: number,
   264	  nextPullsSinceEpic: number
   265	): Promise<boolean> => {
   266	  await transaction.multi();
   267	  await transaction.incrBy(getInkKey(userId), -CAPSULE_COST);
   268	
   269	  if (!isNew) {
   270	    await transaction.incrBy(getInkKey(userId), DUPLICATE_REFUND);
   271	  }
   272	
   273	  await transaction.set(getCapsulePullCountKey(userId), nextPullCount.toString());
   274	  await transaction.set(
   275	    getPullsSinceEpicKey(userId),
   276	    nextPullsSinceEpic.toString()
   277	  );
   278	
   279	  if (isNew) {
   280	    await transaction.hSet(getInventoryKey(userId), {
   281	      [entry.id]: entry.kind,
   282	    });
   283	  }
   284	
   285	  const execResult: unknown = await transaction.exec();
   286	  return Array.isArray(execResult) && execResult.length > 0;
   287	};
   288	
   289	const discardTransaction = async (
   290	  transaction: InkTransaction | undefined
   291	): Promise<void> => {
   292	  if (!transaction) {
   293	    return;
   294	  }
   295	
   296	  try {
   297	    await transaction.discard();
   298	  } catch (error) {
   299	    console.warn('Mystery Ink transaction cleanup failed:', error);
   300	  }
   301	};
   302	
   303	const readPullCount = async (
   304	  storage: ArenaStorage,
   305	  userId: string
   306	): Promise<number> => {
   307	  return parseStoredNonNegativeInteger(
   308	    await storage.get(getCapsulePullCountKey(userId))
   309	  );
   310	};
   311	
   312	const readPullsSinceEpic = async (
   313	  storage: ArenaStorage,
   314	  userId: string
   315	): Promise<number> => {
   316	  return parseStoredNonNegativeInteger(
   317	    await storage.get(getPullsSinceEpicKey(userId))
   318	  );
   319	};
   320	
   321	export const pullCapsuleForUser = async (
   322	  storage: InkStorage,
   323	  userId: string,
   324	  day: number
   325	): Promise<CapsulePullResult> => {
   326	  const watchedKeys = [
   327	    getInkKey(userId),
   328	    getInventoryKey(userId),
   329	    getCapsulePullCountKey(userId),
   330	    getPullsSinceEpicKey(userId),
   331	  ];
   332	
   333	  for (let attempt = 0; attempt < maximumTransactionAttempts; attempt += 1) {
   334	    let transaction: InkTransaction | undefined;
   335	
   336	    try {
   337	      if (storage.watch) {
   338	        transaction = await storage.watch(...watchedKeys);
   339	      }
   340	
   341	      const inkBalance = await getInkBalance(storage, userId);
   342	
   343	      if (inkBalance < CAPSULE_COST) {
   344	        if (transaction) {
   345	          await transaction.unwatch();
   346	        }
   347	
   348	        return {
   349	          status: 'insufficientInk',
   350	          ink: inkBalance,
   351	        };
   352	      }
   353	
   354	      const pullCount = await readPullCount(storage, userId);
   355	      const pullsSinceEpic = await readPullsSinceEpic(storage, userId);
   356	      const inventoryEntries = await storage.hGetAll(getInventoryKey(userId));
   357	      const nextPullCount = pullCount + 1;
   358	      const selectedEntry = selectCapsuleDrop({
   359	        userId,
   360	        day,
   361	        pullCount: nextPullCount,
   362	        pullsSinceEpic,
   363	      });
   364	      const isNew = inventoryEntries[selectedEntry.id] === undefined;
   365	      const nextPullsSinceEpic =
   366	        selectedEntry.rarity === 'epic' ? 0 : pullsSinceEpic + 1;
   367	
   368	      if (transaction) {
   369	        const committed = await applyCapsulePullWithTransaction(
   370	          transaction,
   371	          userId,
   372	          selectedEntry,
   373	          isNew,
   374	          nextPullCount,
   375	          nextPullsSinceEpic
   376	        );
   377	
   378	        if (!committed) {
   379	          continue;
   380	        }

@@ -0,0 +1,405 @@
+import type {
+  CapsulePull,
+  CapsuleRarity,
+  Inventory,
+} from '../../shared/arena';
+import {
+  CAPSULE_COST,
+  CAPSULE_PITY,
+  DUPLICATE_REFUND,
+} from '../../shared/arena';
+import { createSeededNumberGenerator, hashTextToSeed } from './random';
+import type { ArenaStorage } from './scribbit';
+import {
+  INK_CATALOG,
+  INK_PEN_CATALOG,
+  INK_TITLE_CATALOG,
+  type InkCatalogEntry,
+} from './ink';
+
+type InkTransaction = {
+  multi: () => Promise<void>;
+  exec: () => Promise<unknown[]>;
+  discard: () => Promise<void>;
+  unwatch: () => Promise<unknown>;
+  incrBy: (key: string, value: number) => Promise<unknown>;
+  set: (key: string, value: string) => Promise<unknown>;
+  hSet: (key: string, fieldValues: Record<string, string>) => Promise<unknown>;
+};
+
+export type InkStorage = ArenaStorage & {
+  watch?: (...keys: string[]) => Promise<InkTransaction>;
+};
+
+export type CapsulePullSuccess = {
+  status: 'pulled';
+  pull: CapsulePull;
+  ink: number;
+  inventory: Inventory;
+};
+
+export type CapsulePullInsufficientInk = {
+  status: 'insufficientInk';
+  ink: number;
+};
+
+export type CapsulePullResult =
+  | CapsulePullSuccess
+  | CapsulePullInsufficientInk;
+
+type CapsuleSelectionOptions = {
+  userId: string;
+  day: number;
+  pullCount: number;
+  pullsSinceEpic: number;
+};
+
+type InkRewardClaimOptions = {
+  payoutKey: string;
+  payoutField: string;
+  userId: string;
+  amount: number;
+  paidAtMs: number;
+};
+
+const maximumTransactionAttempts = 5;
+
+export const getInkKey = (userId: string): string => {
+  return `ink:${userId}`;
+};
+
+export const getInventoryKey = (userId: string): string => {
+  return `inventory:${userId}`;
+};
+
+export const getPullsSinceEpicKey = (userId: string): string => {
+  return `pullsSinceEpic:${userId}`;
+};
+
+export const getCapsulePullCountKey = (userId: string): string => {
+  return `capsulePulls:${userId}`;
+};
+
+export const getRumbleWinInkPayoutKey = (day: number): string => {
+  return `ink:payout:rumbleWin:${day}`;
+};
+
+const parseStoredNonNegativeInteger = (
+  storedValue: string | undefined
+): number => {
+  if (storedValue === undefined) {
+    return 0;
+  }
+
+  const parsedValue = Number(storedValue);
+  if (!Number.isInteger(parsedValue) || parsedValue < 0) {
+    return 0;
+  }
+
+  return parsedValue;
+};
+
+export const getInkBalance = async (
+  storage: ArenaStorage,
+  userId: string
+): Promise<number> => {
+  return parseStoredNonNegativeInteger(await storage.get(getInkKey(userId)));
+};
+
+export const awardInk = async (
+  storage: ArenaStorage,
+  userId: string,
+  amount: number
+): Promise<number> => {
+  if (!Number.isInteger(amount) || amount <= 0) {
+    return await getInkBalance(storage, userId);
+  }
+
+  return await storage.incrBy(getInkKey(userId), amount);
+};
+
+export const claimInkReward = async (
+  storage: ArenaStorage,
+  options: InkRewardClaimOptions
+): Promise<boolean> => {
+  if (options.amount <= 0) {
+    return false;
+  }
+
+  const createdClaim = await storage.hSetNX(
+    options.payoutKey,
+    options.payoutField,
+    `${options.userId}:${options.amount}:${options.paidAtMs}`
+  );
+
+  if (createdClaim !== 1) {
+    return false;
+  }
+
+  await awardInk(storage, options.userId, options.amount);
+  return true;
+};
+
+export const loadInventory = async (
+  storage: ArenaStorage,
+  userId: string
+): Promise<Inventory> => {
+  const storedInventory = await storage.hGetAll(getInventoryKey(userId));
+
+  return {
+    pens: INK_PEN_CATALOG.filter((entry) => {
+      return storedInventory[entry.id] !== undefined;
+    }).map((entry) => {
+      return entry.id;
+    }),
+    titles: INK_TITLE_CATALOG.filter((entry) => {
+      return storedInventory[entry.id] !== undefined;
+    }).map((entry) => {
+      return entry.id;
+    }),
+  };
+};
+
+export const chooseCapsuleRarity = (roll: number): CapsuleRarity => {
+  if (roll < 0.7) {
+    return 'common';
+  }
+
+  if (roll < 0.95) {
+    return 'rare';
+  }
+
+  return 'epic';
+};
+
+export const isCapsulePityPull = (pullsSinceEpic: number): boolean => {
+  return pullsSinceEpic + 1 >= CAPSULE_PITY;
+};
+
+const chooseEntryForRarity = (
+  rarity: CapsuleRarity,
+  roll: number
+): InkCatalogEntry => {
+  const matchingEntries = INK_CATALOG.filter((entry) => {
+    return entry.rarity === rarity;
+  });
+  const selectedEntry = matchingEntries[Math.floor(roll * matchingEntries.length)];
+
+  if (!selectedEntry) {
+    throw new Error(`No Mystery Ink catalog entries for ${rarity}.`);
+  }
+
+  return selectedEntry;
+};
+
+export const selectCapsuleDrop = (
+  options: CapsuleSelectionOptions
+): InkCatalogEntry => {
+  const seed = hashTextToSeed(
+    `capsule:${options.userId}:${options.day}:${options.pullCount}`
+  );
+  const randomNumber = createSeededNumberGenerator(seed);
+  const rarity = isCapsulePityPull(options.pullsSinceEpic)
+    ? 'epic'
+    : chooseCapsuleRarity(randomNumber());
+
+  return chooseEntryForRarity(rarity, randomNumber());
+};
+
+const createCapsulePull = (
+  entry: InkCatalogEntry,
+  isNew: boolean
+): CapsulePull => {
+  return {
+    rarity: entry.rarity,
+    kind: entry.kind,
+    id: entry.id,
+    name: entry.name,
+    description: entry.description,
+    isNew,
+  };
+};
+
+const unlockInventoryEntry = async (
+  storage: ArenaStorage,
+  userId: string,
+  entry: InkCatalogEntry
+): Promise<void> => {
+  await storage.hSet(getInventoryKey(userId), {
+    [entry.id]: entry.kind,
+  });
+};
+
+const applyCapsulePullWithoutTransaction = async (
+  storage: InkStorage,
+  userId: string,
+  entry: InkCatalogEntry,
+  isNew: boolean,
+  nextPullCount: number,
+  nextPullsSinceEpic: number
+): Promise<void> => {
+  await storage.incrBy(getInkKey(userId), -CAPSULE_COST);
+
+  if (!isNew) {
+    await storage.incrBy(getInkKey(userId), DUPLICATE_REFUND);
+  }
+
+  await storage.set(getCapsulePullCountKey(userId), nextPullCount.toString());
+  await storage.set(
+    getPullsSinceEpicKey(userId),
+    nextPullsSinceEpic.toString()
+  );
+
+  if (isNew) {
+    await unlockInventoryEntry(storage, userId, entry);
+  }
+};
+
+const applyCapsulePullWithTransaction = async (
+  transaction: InkTransaction,
+  userId: string,
+  entry: InkCatalogEntry,
+  isNew: boolean,
+  nextPullCount: number,
+  nextPullsSinceEpic: number
+): Promise<boolean> => {
+  await transaction.multi();
+  await transaction.incrBy(getInkKey(userId), -CAPSULE_COST);
+
+  if (!isNew) {
+    await transaction.incrBy(getInkKey(userId), DUPLICATE_REFUND);
+  }
+
+  await transaction.set(getCapsulePullCountKey(userId), nextPullCount.toString());
+  await transaction.set(
+    getPullsSinceEpicKey(userId),
+    nextPullsSinceEpic.toString()
+  );
+
+  if (isNew) {
+    await transaction.hSet(getInventoryKey(userId), {
+      [entry.id]: entry.kind,
+    });
+  }
+
+  const execResult: unknown = await transaction.exec();
+  return Array.isArray(execResult) && execResult.length > 0;
+};
+
+const discardTransaction = async (
+  transaction: InkTransaction | undefined
+): Promise<void> => {
+  if (!transaction) {
+    return;
+  }
+
+  try {
+    await transaction.discard();
+  } catch (error) {
+    console.warn('Mystery Ink transaction cleanup failed:', error);
+  }
+};
+
+const readPullCount = async (
+  storage: ArenaStorage,
+  userId: string
+): Promise<number> => {
+  return parseStoredNonNegativeInteger(
+    await storage.get(getCapsulePullCountKey(userId))
+  );
+};
+
+const readPullsSinceEpic = async (
+  storage: ArenaStorage,
+  userId: string
+): Promise<number> => {
+  return parseStoredNonNegativeInteger(
+    await storage.get(getPullsSinceEpicKey(userId))
+  );
+};
+
+export const pullCapsuleForUser = async (
+  storage: InkStorage,
+  userId: string,
+  day: number
+): Promise<CapsulePullResult> => {
+  const watchedKeys = [
+    getInkKey(userId),
+    getInventoryKey(userId),
+    getCapsulePullCountKey(userId),
+    getPullsSinceEpicKey(userId),
+  ];
+
+  for (let attempt = 0; attempt < maximumTransactionAttempts; attempt += 1) {
+    let transaction: InkTransaction | undefined;
+
+    try {
+      if (storage.watch) {
+        transaction = await storage.watch(...watchedKeys);
+      }
+
+      const inkBalance = await getInkBalance(storage, userId);
+
+      if (inkBalance < CAPSULE_COST) {
+        if (transaction) {
+          await transaction.unwatch();
+        }
+
+        return {
+          status: 'insufficientInk',
+          ink: inkBalance,
+        };
+      }
+
+      const pullCount = await readPullCount(storage, userId);
+      const pullsSinceEpic = await readPullsSinceEpic(storage, userId);
+      const inventoryEntries = await storage.hGetAll(getInventoryKey(userId));
+      const nextPullCount = pullCount + 1;
+      const selectedEntry = selectCapsuleDrop({
+        userId,
+        day,
+        pullCount: nextPullCount,
+        pullsSinceEpic,
+      });
+      const isNew = inventoryEntries[selectedEntry.id] === undefined;
+      const nextPullsSinceEpic =
+        selectedEntry.rarity === 'epic' ? 0 : pullsSinceEpic + 1;
+
+      if (transaction) {
+        const committed = await applyCapsulePullWithTransaction(
+          transaction,
+          userId,
+          selectedEntry,
+          isNew,
+          nextPullCount,
+          nextPullsSinceEpic
+        );
+
+        if (!committed) {
+          continue;
+        }
+      } else {
+        await applyCapsulePullWithoutTransaction(
+          storage,
+          userId,
+          selectedEntry,
+          isNew,
+          nextPullCount,
+          nextPullsSinceEpic
+        );
+      }
+
+      return {
+        status: 'pulled',
+        pull: createCapsulePull(selectedEntry, isNew),
+        ink: inkBalance - CAPSULE_COST + (isNew ? 0 : DUPLICATE_REFUND),
+        inventory: await loadInventory(storage, userId),
+      };
+    } catch (error) {
+      await discardTransaction(transaction);
+      throw error;
+    }
+  }
+
+  throw new Error('Mystery Ink capsule pull did not settle.');
+};

+api.get('/inventory', async (c) => {
+  const player = await getCurrentPlayer();
+
+  if (!player) {
+    return c.json<Inventory>({ pens: [], titles: [] });
+  }
+
+  try {
+    return c.json<Inventory>(await loadInventory(redis, player.userId));
+  } catch (error) {
+    console.error('Inventory route failed:', error);
+    return serverError(c, 'The ink drawer is stuck. Try again soon.');
+  }
+});
+
+api.post('/capsule', async (c) => {
+  const player = await getCurrentPlayer();
+
+  if (!player) {
+    return unauthorized(c, 'Sign in to open a Mystery Ink capsule.');
+  }
+
+  try {
+    const dayNumber = await ensureCurrentArenaDay(redis, new Date());
+    const result = await pullCapsuleForUser(redis, player.userId, dayNumber);
+
+    if (result.status === 'insufficientInk') {
+      return paymentRequired(
+        c,
+        `You need ${CAPSULE_COST} Mystery Ink to open a capsule.`
+      );
+    }
+
+    return c.json<CapsulePull>(result.pull);
+  } catch (error) {
+    console.error('Capsule route failed:', error);
+    return serverError(c, 'The capsule machine jammed. Try again soon.');
+  }
+});

 api.post('/boss-challenge', async (c) => {
   const player = await getCurrentPlayer();
